summary: Frontend testing of Phase 5 features: Auth flow, UpgradeModal, and Sync Indicators. Fixed critical infinite loop bug in useUpgradeModal hook. All tested features working correctly.

issues: Chart warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - Recharts complaining about container dimensions during mount

frontend: Auth flow: Dashboard route (/dashboard) redirects to landing page when not authenticated
Auth modal: Opens automatically after accessing protected route
Auth modal: Shows 'Welcome back' title
Auth modal: Email input with placeholder 'you@startup.com'
Auth modal: 'Continue with Email' button present and visible
Auth modal: Benefits list shows 'Unlimited free projections', 'Save and share', 'Track your progress'
Sync indicators: Command Centre shows 'Just now' status with green pulsing dot
Sync indicators: Revenue Intelligence shows green sync dot in header
Refresh button: Found with title 'Refresh data' and functional
Command Centre: Health Score (78), Action Queue (3 items), Milestone countdown visible
Command Centre: AI Priority/TOP PRIORITY section present
Command Centre: Monthly Check-in button opens modal
Check-in Modal: Month dropdown, Actual Revenue input, Notes textarea, Submit button
Revenue Intelligence: MRR (₹4.20 Lakh), MoM Growth (+20%), vs Baseline (+47%), vs Benchmark (+64%)
Revenue Intelligence: Revenue vs Baseline vs Benchmark chart rendered
Revenue Intelligence: Revenue Quality Score (82) with breakdown
Revenue Intelligence: Cohort Tracking table with monthly retention data
UpgradeModal component: Has all variants defined (RATE_LIMIT, PREMIUM_FEATURE, AI_BUDGET, CONNECTOR_LIMIT)
UpgradeModal: Plan comparison table with Free vs Founder features
UpgradeModal: CTA button 'Upgrade to Founder Plan — ₹899/year'
Sidebar Navigation: All 10 menu items present and accessible

bugs_fixed.issue: useUpgradeModal hook caused infinite re-render loop (Maximum update depth exceeded)
bugs_fixed.fix: Wrapped showUpgradeModal and hideUpgradeModal functions in useCallback to maintain stable references
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Functions returned from hook were recreated on every render, causing useEffect in CommandCentre to trigger infinitely

action_items: Consider adding data-testid to sidebar links for easier testing
The chart dimension warnings on initial mount are cosmetic but could be addressed with proper container sizing
Preview pages sidebar links point to protected routes - clicking them redirects to auth. Consider adding preview-specific links if standalone preview is needed
critical_code_review_comments: SyncIndicator components well-implemented with useSyncState hook (though useSyncState has same pattern issue with dependencies - not used directly)
Auth flow using Supabase Magic Link is properly integrated
Preview pages effectively bypass auth for screenshot purposes
UpgradeModal has comprehensive variant support for different trigger scenarios
Dashboard APIs use fallback data when not authenticated - good defensive coding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 frontend testing complete. Fixed infinite loop bug in useUpgradeModal hook. Auth flow, sync indicators, and dashboard components all working. Preview routes (/preview/*) bypass auth. Dashboard uses fallback data when not authenticated. Supabase Magic Link integration is configured but requires actual Supabase project for full auth testing.

mocked_api.note: Dashboard APIs use fallback data when API calls fail or user not authenticated

rca_of_the_issue: Infinite loop in Command Centre was caused by useUpgradeModal hook returning new function references on every render. The showUpgradeModal function was included as a dependency in CommandCentre's loadData useCallback, which triggered useEffect to re-run the loadData function infinitely. Fixed by wrapping hook functions in useCallback.
